title: Bounties and Coins
description:
Diverse Bounties offers a range of tasks, from simple wheat collection to challenging Sculk Catalyst hunts, with rewards matched to difficulty

Inject life into your world's economy with coins earned from bounties
body:
Key Features:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f5783c065aba59d4ab751e4622d24d519213abf.png)

The mod adds several bounties that reward coins, they are ranked by difficulty, the easiest ones can be collecting 64 wheat. It's a great mod to add economy to the game, and great to use with shop mods for the use of coins.

Craft a Bounty Board to access several bounties, collect the requirement for the bounty item you grab from the Board, then right click for the rewards. 

Available for Fabric and Forge
